data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: The design of Netflix's interface is visually appealing, enhancing perceived usability despite occasional complexity.
data.technical_spec: Rich visuals, intuitive navigation, and a focus on user engagement through personalized recommendations.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Limits decision time by simplifying choices; key for content discovery.
data.technical_spec: Dynamic rendering of content categories based on user preferences reduces cognitive load.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Interactive elements are designed for easier and faster access to improve user experience.
data.technical_spec: Primary actions, like 'Play' and 'Add to List,' are large and centrally located to enhance accessibility.

data.title: Social Proof
data.description: User behaviors are influenced by community ratings and popular lists.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates ratings, reviews, and social features to guide content selection.

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: Content placement is optimized to leverage primacy and recency effects.
data.technical_spec: Frequent updates to the content carousel ensure fresh and engaging start pages.
